message:
chore: Remove demo_showcase test artifacts from tracking

Remove crates/demo_showcase/target/ test output files (536 files) from
version control. Test artifacts should never have been committed. The
existing **/target/ gitignore pattern prevents re-adding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
